overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European city at dusk. The character traverses cobblestone streets, passes through a stone archway gate, walks along elevated waterfront pathways, and descends stairs to a panoramic river overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cobblestone walkway approaching city gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along elevated pathway toward the stone archway gate

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: low stone wall bordering the elevated walkway
large metal fire baskets emitting smoke and warm light
half-timbered medieval houses with dark wooden beams
stone towers and red rooftops of the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an elevated cobblestone pathway toward a city gate, with timber-framed buildings on the left and a stone wall on the right. Burning braziers provide warm light against the cool overcast sky, and the distant city skyline is visible ahead.

events.description: entering stone archway gate, lighting dims significantly as sky becomes obscured

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the enclosed stone archway passage

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking through the archway in opposite direction

entered.detail: vaulted stone ceiling and walls of the gate passage
raised metal portcullis visible at the far end of the archway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark stone archway passage with vaulted ceilings. Light from the exit illuminates the far end while timber-framed buildings press close on the left. A woman in red passes by as Geralt moves through the enclosed gate structure.

events.description: exiting archway into open waterfront area with river visible to the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along waterfront path with river to the right, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: wide river with mist rising from the surface
crenellated stone wall separating path from river drop

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway, the scene opens to a waterfront promenade with the river visible to the right beyond a stone parapet. Geralt walks along the cobblestone path as the sky opens up above, with timber-framed buildings continuing along the left side.

events.description: beginning ascent of stone stairs along the city wall
reaching top of stairs and beginning descent toward lower level

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs then descending along the wall, changing elevation significantly

notable_agents.action: man leaning on parapet wall overlooking the river

entered.detail: worn stone steps ascending and descending along the wall
tall stone wall rising alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to stone stairs ascending and then descending along the city wall. A man leans on the parapet overlooking the river, which shifts from right to left as the camera turns. The ground changes from cobblestones to worn stone steps.

events.description: reaching lower wooden platform with panoramic river and city views

agents.ego_description: Geralt reaching overlook and turning to view the river and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: man gesturing toward the river view with arms raised

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks at the waterfront overlook
panoramic view of towers and buildings across the river

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches a wooden overlook platform at the water's edge, providing a panoramic view of the river and distant city skyline. An NPC gestures toward the view while standing on the weathered wooden deck. The scene opens up to a wide vista of the city across the misty water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval city that transitions from narrow, enclosed streets into a wide, panoramic river overlook. It begins with Geralt walking along an elevated cobblestone pathway lined with timber-framed buildings and burning braziers under a cool overcast sky. As he moves forward, the scene shifts into the shadow of a dark stone archway with vaulted ceilings, passing a woman in red before emerging back into the open air. The camera then follows him onto a waterfront promenade where the river appears to the right, eventually transitioning from cobblestones to worn stone stairs that wind along the city wall. Finally, the path opens onto a weathered wooden platform at the water's edge, revealing a sweeping vista of the misty river and the distant city skyline.
